## 安装sdk
```js

npm i @cloudbase/js-sdk @cloudbase/adapter-rn
```


## 初始化sdk
```javascript


import cloudbaseSDK from "@cloudbase/js-sdk";
import adapter from "@cloudbase/adapter-rn";

cloudbaseSDK.useAdapters(adapter);

const cloudbase = cloudbaseSDK.init({
  // 环境 ID
  env: "hibiscus-1995-d4g2ysc4s44d440d1",
  // 地域
  region: "ap-shanghai",
  // 匿名访问令牌
  accessKey: "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjlkMWRjMzFlLWI0ZDAtNDQ4Yi1hNzZmLWIwY2M2M2Q4MTQ5OCJ9..p_qiVpIwjky9lkRacjuFFkQsrX7Yk6qjmP-QjWZ37VBQtwBt2VNng-6wjumvOBLyeRhjEPOR46zGV-NYZbSZfrcmi-trXSFV__x9p-RBArKMXBHcGHx9bGKBE35aqcH-5sR9zvvzXxJgzBoXdUnjinNh4hBS6OYBWqhEZGqrRrj7Q15Th0LnsGLp-2AmqCUimzIXKXmRPZjPEsXF5tqk3hCyTbV0yACCPmHRWP3-6kyvb9mMeV9ndzwm_e6t3-89h1ssbFjBDKykkI71sRMUkEqbdp5OKF7_afMUQJscSmoHHo_40OlRF7Cg6k5n0Md-xnOFMORQY4-FqIihv6nlCw"
});

export default cloudbase;

```
